heroHeadline: Gulf States Report Attacks Despite Ceasefire; Israel Strikes Lebanon as US-Iran Truce Takes Effect
heroSubtitle: UAE, Kuwait, and Bahrain report attacks on their territory despite the US-Iran two-week ceasefire, raising scope questions. Israel separately strikes southern Lebanon, consistent with Netanyahu's position that the truce does not cover Lebanon operations.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
